summary: Tested SKR51 Kontenrahmen feature for Candis-Kopie. All 6 requested features verified: login, settings navigation, SKR51 radio button visibility, SKR51 save, GET /api/accounts?kontenrahmen=SKR51 returning 203 accounts, and expected categories. 17/17 backend tests passed, all frontend flows confirmed via Playwright.
critical_code_review_comments: SKR51 correctly implemented with 203 accounts covering all required categories for non-profit orgs
Settings model correctly allows 'SKR03', 'SKR04', or 'SKR51' as default_kontenrahmen
GET /api/accounts auto-seeds DB on first request per kontenrahmen - lazy loading works correctly
MongoDB _id properly excluded from accounts API response
PUT /api/settings correctly requires admin auth (401 without token)
DATEV Export and SEPA Banking are MOCKED/SIMULATED as per requirements (visible in Settings)
seed_data_creation: None - SKR51 accounts auto-seeded by GET /api/accounts?kontenrahmen=SKR51 on first call
context_for_next_testing_agent: SKR51 fully working. Settings screen has user management at top, scroll down ~1200px to reach Firmendaten/Kontenrahmen section. SKR51 radio button is 3rd in the row. After clicking SKR51, hint text '🏛️ Für gemeinnützige Organisationen, Vereine und Stiftungen' appears. Save shows green toast 'Einstellungen wurden gespeichert'. GET /api/accounts?kontenrahmen=SKR51 does NOT require auth.

test_results.login_admin: PASS - admin@candis-kopie.de/admin123 returns 200 with admin role token
test_results.settings_tab_navigation: PASS - Einstellungen tab navigates to /settings correctly
test_results.skr51_radio_button_visible: PASS - SKR03, SKR04, SKR51 all visible in Standard-Kontenrahmen section
test_results.skr51_click_hint_text: PASS - Clicking SKR51 shows 'Für gemeinnützige Organisationen, Vereine und Stiftungen' hint
test_results.skr51_save_settings: PASS - PUT /api/settings returns 200, success toast 'Einstellungen wurden gespeichert' shown
test_results.settings_auth_protection: PASS - PUT /api/settings returns 401 without auth token
